data.title: 国际服3.5周年纪念OST专辑包装和官方商品预购
data.summary: [3.5-Year Anniversary OST Album Package & Official Merchandise Pre-Order Announcement] To celebrate
data.body:
[3.5-Year Anniversary OST Album Package & Official Merchandise Pre-Order Announcement] 

To celebrate a special 3.5 years with you, Sensei, We’ve once again prepared an OST package and an official merchandise showcase!

➡️https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2842502
